skills.name: lifi-skill
skills.author: fabriziogianni7
skills.description: Execute cross-chain and same-chain token swaps and bridges via LI.FI API — route quoting, chain/token validation, transaction building, and status tracking, aggregating multiple bridge and DEX protocols
skills.example: Say: 'Bridge ETH from Ethereum to Arbitrum' or 'Find optimal route for USDC from Polygon to Base'

skills.name: multichain-protocol
skills.author: kyounesmercatura
skills.description: MeneseSDK 19-chain wallet on ICP for token transfers, multi-DEX swaps (Raydium/Uniswap/Cetus), cross-chain bridging, DeFi positions and automated trading strategies
skills.example: Say: 'Send USDC from Solana to Ethereum' or 'Swap SOL on Raydium'
skills.dapps: Raydium, Uniswap, ICPSwap, Cetus, Aave, Lido

skills.name: abstract-onboard
skills.author: masoncags-tech
skills.description: Full Abstract ZK Stack L2 toolkit for smart contract deployment, asset bridging, AGW wallet creation, DEX trading (Kona/Aborean) and Myriad prediction markets
skills.example: Say: 'Bridge ETH to Abstract' or 'Deploy a smart contract on Abstract'

skills.name: lifi-crosschain
skills.author: rhlsthrm
skills.description: LI.FI cross-chain aggregator finding optimal routes across 35+ chains comparing dozens of bridges (Stargate, Hop, Across) and DEXes for swaps, bridges, route queries, and tracking
skills.example: Say: 'Bridge 0.1 ETH from Ethereum to Polygon' or 'Track my cross-chain transaction status'

skills.name: lifi-orchestrator
skills.author: rhlsthrm
skills.description: LI.FI cross-chain orchestrator with Python scripts for bridging and swapping across 15+ chains including Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, and Solana with quote, execute, and status tracking
skills.example: Say: 'Get a cross-chain quote for ETH to Polygon USDC' or 'Execute a bridge and track progress'

skills.name: cross-chain-swap
skills.author: wpank
skills.description: Execute cross-chain token swaps handling quoting, route evaluation, safety checks, bridge monitoring, and destination confirmation in one workflow
skills.example: Say: 'Swap ETH on Arbitrum for USDC on Base'
skills.user_provides: Source chain token, destination chain token

skills.name: near-intents
skills.author: cuongdcdev
skills.description: NEAR Intents 1Click SDK universal cross-chain swap and bridge tool supporting 14+ blockchains (NEAR/Base/ETH/Solana/BTC etc.), auto-completing swaps by depositing to a generated address
skills.example: Say: 'Bridge USDC from Base to Solana' or 'Cross-chain swap ETH for SOL'

skills.name: universal-trading
skills.author: 0xmomo-ngclubs
skills.description: Execute cross-chain token trading on EVM and Solana with Particle Network Universal Account SDK for unified convert/swap flows, asset transfers, and custom transactions
skills.example: Say: 'Cross-chain swap tokens' or 'Set up Universal Account'

skills.name: bridge-tokens
skills.author: wpank
skills.description: Cross-chain token bridge tool using Uniswap routing to move tokens between chains (e.g., USDC from Ethereum to Base) without token swaps
skills.example: Say: 'Bridge USDC from Ethereum to Base' or 'Move ETH cross-chain'

skills.name: taiko-native-bridge
skills.author: davidtaikocha
skills.description: Taiko native cross-chain bridge CLI tool for bidirectional ETH transfers between Ethereum L1 and Taiko L2, supporting deposit and withdrawal operations
skills.example: Say: "Bridge ETH from Ethereum to Taiko" or "Withdraw ETH from Taiko to L1"

skills.name: cosmos
skills.author: Unknown
skills.description: Cosmos ecosystem navigation guide covering IBC cross-chain communication, ATOM staking, multi-chain wallet management and Cosmos Hub interaction
skills.example: Say: "Transfer from Cosmos Hub to Osmosis via IBC"

skills.name: trails
skills.author: Unknown
skills.description: Trails cross-chain infrastructure integration guide supporting Widget/SDK/API integration for cross-chain swaps, bridging, payments and chain abstraction
skills.example: Say: "Help me integrate the Trails cross-chain swap Widget"

skills.name: htlc
skills.author: web4agent
skills.description: Hash Time Locked Contract atomic swaps for inscriptions and NFTs on Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum and other EVM chains
skills.example: Say: "Create an HTLC atomic swap" or "Securely trade NFT via hash lock"

skills.name: nexwave-gateway
skills.author: botmechanic
skills.description: Unified crosschain USDC balance via Circle Gateway, deposit on any chain and instantly mint on destination in <500ms without bridging
skills.example: Say: "Check unified USDC balance" or "Deposit from Polygon and mint on Arbitrum"
skills.user_provides: Circle API key and entity secret
